privileged_info_summary: The task uses Sygic GPS Navigation, a real commercial Android app, to configure POI (Points of Interest) display settings. The app contains the following top-level POI categories: Parking (SYParking), Shopping (SYShopping), Petrol Station (SYPetrolStation), Tourism (SYTourism), and Accommodation (SYAccommodation), among others. Critical finding: 'Restaurant' and 'Hotel' are not top-level categories in Sygic settings—they are subcategories nested under 'Food and Drink' and 'Accommodation' respectively. The metadata claims to disable 'Restaurant' and 'Hotel' as if they were independent top-level categories, which contradicts the actual app structure where only the parent categories (Eating & Drinking / Food and Drink, Accommodation) can be toggled in settings.
